description_long: This factory building complex features a modern industrial design with multiple flat-roofed structures, large solar panel arrays, and a mix of concrete and glass facades. The main building has prominent rectangular windows and a rooftop equipped with mechanical units and vents. Adjacent to the main structure is a secondary building with a sloped roof, also covered in solar panels, and a visible loading area. The perimeter is defined by a low concrete wall, and the complex is bordered by a wide asphalt road. The color palette includes shades of gray, blue, and beige, giving the site a contemporary, utilitarian appearance. The presence of rooftop machinery and large windows suggests a focus on energy efficiency and industrial functionality.
description: A modern industrial factory complex with flat roofs, solar panels, large windows, and rooftop machinery, surrounded by a concrete wall and adjacent to a wide road.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main building with its flat roof, large windows, and rooftop machinery, as well as the adjacent solar-panel-covered structure and the surrounding concrete wall.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the front facade of the main building, the entrance area, and the prominent solar panels on the secondary structure, with the road and wall clearly visible.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a perspective from the rear, emphasizing the solar panels on both buildings and the overall layout of the complex, including the road and wall.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the back and side of the main building, rooftop machinery, and the secondary structure, with the concrete wall enclosing the site.
